title: VehicleDetail
description: Extended vehicle representation returned by `inventory.vehicle`. Inherits all base Vehicle fields and explicitly declares the rich, dealer-side properties that go beyond the unified Vehicle interface used in lead.submit. `additionalProperties: true` lets dealers carry further site-specific equipment, history-report links, or certification details without schema changes.

dealer_id.description: Stable identifier of the dealer that owns this listing.

vehicle_id.description: Dealer-internal identifier when the vehicle is not yet VIN-decoded (e.g. an in-transit unit).

engine.description: Engine description (e.g. '2.0L Turbo I4', '3.5L V6 Hybrid').

mpg.description: Fuel economy estimates. Omit for fully electric vehicles or use 'electric_range_mi' instead.

electric_range_mi.description: Estimated electric range in miles, for BEV and PHEV vehicles.

interior_color.description: Free-text interior color or upholstery name.

photos.description: Public URLs of vehicle photos, ordered by relevance.

vdp_url.description: Public Vehicle Detail Page (VDP) URL on the dealer's website.

status.description: Free-text availability status (e.g. 'In Stock', 'In Transit', 'Pending', 'Sold', 'Reserved'). Recommended but not enforced as a controlled vocabulary.

last_verified_at.description: ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 timestamp (with timezone offset) at which the dealer last verified availability/price/status of this listing. REQUIRED when the agent makes availability claims (e.g. '2026-04-30T08:42:00Z').
